verses.latin_vulgate: Fili mi, si susceperis sermones meos,  et mandata mea absconderis penes te :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּ֭נִי אִם־תִּקַּ֣ח אֲמָרָ֑י וּ֝מִצְוֺתַ֗י תִּצְפֹּ֥ן אִתָּֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: My son, if thou wilt receive my words, and wilt hide my commandments with thee,
verses.finnish_biblia: Poikani, jos otat minun puheeni, ja käskyni kätket;
verses.king_james: My son, if thou wilt receive my words, and hide my commandments with thee;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut audiat sapientiam auris tua,  inclina cor tuum ad cognoscendam prudentiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְהַקְשִׁ֣יב לַחׇכְמָ֣ה אׇזְנֶ֑ךָ תַּטֶּ֥ה לִ֝בְּךָ֗ לַתְּבוּנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: That thy ear may hearken to wisdom: incline thy heart to know prudence.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin anna korvas kuulla viisautta, ja taivuta sydämes ymmärrykseen.
verses.king_james: So that thou incline thine ear unto wisdom, and apply thine heart to understanding;

verses.latin_vulgate: Si enim sapientiam invocaveris,  et inclinaveris cor tuum prudentiæ ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י אִ֣ם לַבִּינָ֣ה תִקְרָ֑א לַ֝תְּבוּנָ֗ה תִּתֵּ֥ן קוֹלֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For if thou shalt call for wisdom, and incline thy heart to prudence:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä jos ymmärrystä ahkerasti halajat, ja rukoilet taitoa;
verses.king_james: Yea, if thou criest after knowledge, and liftest up thy voice for understanding;

verses.latin_vulgate: si quæsieris eam quasi pecuniam,  et sicut thesauros effoderis illam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־תְּבַקְשֶׁ֥נָּה כַכָּ֑סֶף וְֽכַמַּטְמוֹנִ֥ים תַּחְפְּשֶֽׂנָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: If thou shalt seek her as money, and shalt dig for her as for a treasure:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos sitä etsit niinkuin hopiaa, ja pyörit sen perään niinkuin tavaran;
verses.king_james: If thou seekest her as silver, and searchest for her as for hid treasures;

verses.latin_vulgate: tunc intelliges timorem Domini,  et scientiam Dei invenies,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֗ז תָּ֭בִין יִרְאַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֑ה וְדַ֖עַת אֱלֹהִ֣ים תִּמְצָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then shalt thou understand the fear of the Lord, and shalt find the knowledge of God:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sinä ymmärrät Herran pelvon, ja Herran tunnon löydät.
verses.king_james: Then shalt thou understand the fear of the Lord, and find the knowledge of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia Dominus dat sapientiam,  et ex ore ejus prudentia et scientia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יְ֭הֹוָה יִתֵּ֣ן חׇכְמָ֑ה מִ֝פִּ֗יו דַּ֣עַת וּתְבוּנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because the Lord giveth wisdom: and out of his mouth cometh prudence and knowledge.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra antaa viisauden, ja hänen suustansa tulee taito ja ymmärrys.
verses.king_james: For the Lord giveth wisdom: out of his mouth cometh knowledge and understanding.

verses.latin_vulgate: Custodiet rectorum salutem,  et proteget gradientes simpliciter,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (וצפן) [יִצְפֹּ֣ן] לַ֭יְשָׁרִים תּוּשִׁיָּ֑ה מָ֝גֵ֗ן לְהֹ֣לְכֵי תֹֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He wilt keep the salvation of the righteous, and protect them that walk in simplicity,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän antaa toimellisten hyvin käydä, ja suojelee niitä, jotka viattomasti vaeltavat,
verses.king_james: He layeth up sound wisdom for the righteous: he is a buckler to them that walk uprightly.

verses.latin_vulgate: servans semitas justitiæ,  et vias sanctorum custodiens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִ֭נְצֹר אׇרְח֣וֹת מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וְדֶ֖רֶךְ חֲסִידָ֣ו יִשְׁמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Keeping the paths of justice, and guarding the ways of saints.
verses.finnish_biblia: Varjelee hurskaat, ja holhoo pyhäinsä retket.
verses.king_james: He keepeth the paths of judgment, and preserveth the way of his saints.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc intelliges justitiam, et judicium,  et æquitatem, et omnem semitam bonam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֗ז תָּ֭בִין צֶ֣דֶק וּמִשְׁפָּ֑ט וּ֝מֵישָׁרִ֗ים כׇּל־מַעְגַּל־טֽוֹב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then shalt thou understand justice, and judgment, and equity, and every good path.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin sinä ymmärrät vanhurskauden ja tuomion, oikeuden ja kaiken hyvän tien.
verses.king_james: Then shalt thou understand righteousness, and judgment, and equity; yea, every good path.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si intraverit sapientia cor tuum,  et scientia animæ tuæ placuerit,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־תָב֣וֹא חׇכְמָ֣ה בְלִבֶּ֑ךָ וְ֝דַ֗עַת לְֽנַפְשְׁךָ֥ יִנְעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: If wisdom shall enter into thy heart, and knowledge please thy soul:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos viisaus sydämees tulee, ja taito on sinulle kelvollinen,
verses.king_james: When wisdom entereth into thine heart, and knowledge is pleasant unto thy soul;

verses.latin_vulgate: consilium custodiet te,  et prudentia servabit te :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְ֭זִמָּה תִּשְׁמֹ֥ר עָלֶ֗יךָ תְּבוּנָ֥ה תִנְצְרֶֽכָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Counsel shall keep thee, and prudence shall preserve thee,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin hyvä neuvo sinua varjelee, ja ymmärrys kätkee sinun,
verses.king_james: Discretion shall preserve thee, understanding shall keep thee:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut eruaris a via mala,  et ab homine qui perversa loquitur ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭הַצִּ֣ילְךָ מִדֶּ֣רֶךְ רָ֑ע מֵ֝אִ֗ישׁ מְדַבֵּ֥ר תַּהְפֻּכֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: That thou mayst be delivered from the evil way, and from the man that speaketh perverse things:
verses.finnish_biblia: Tempaamaan sinun pois pahalta tieltä, ja niiden seurasta, jotka toimettomia puhuvat,
verses.king_james: To deliver thee from the way of the evil man, from the man that speaketh froward things;

verses.latin_vulgate: qui relinquunt iter rectum,  et ambulant per vias tenebrosas ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֭עֹ֣זְבִים אׇרְח֣וֹת יֹ֑שֶׁר לָ֝לֶ֗כֶת בְּדַרְכֵי־חֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who leave the right way, and walk by dark ways:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hylkäävät oikian tien, ja vaeltavat pimeitä retkiä;
verses.king_james: Who leave the paths of uprightness, to walk in the ways of darkness;

verses.latin_vulgate: qui lætantur cum malefecerint,  et exsultant in rebus pessimis ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֭שְּׂמֵחִים לַעֲשׂ֥וֹת רָ֑ע יָ֝גִ֗ילוּ בְּֽתַהְפֻּכ֥וֹת רָֽע׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who are glad when they have done evil, and rejoice in the most wicked things:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka iloitsevat pahoista töistänsä, ja riemuitsevat pahoista menoistansa;
verses.king_james: Who rejoice to do evil, and delight in the frowardness of the wicked;

verses.latin_vulgate: quorum viæ perversæ sunt,  et infames gressus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֣ר אׇרְחֹתֵיהֶ֣ם עִקְּשִׁ֑ים וּ֝נְלוֹזִ֗ים בְּמַעְגְּלוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Whose ways are perverse, and their steps infamous.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joiden tiet ovat vastahakoiset, ja retket väärär ja häpiälliset:
verses.king_james: Whose ways are crooked, and they froward in their paths:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ut eruaris a muliere aliena,  et ab extranea quæ mollit sermones suos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭הַצִּ֣ילְךָ מֵאִשָּׁ֣ה זָרָ֑ה מִ֝נׇּכְרִיָּ֗ה אֲמָרֶ֥יהָ הֶחֱלִֽיקָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: That thou mayst be delivered from the strange woman, and from the stranger, who softeneth her words;
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettet sinä ryhtyisi vieraaseen vaimoon, joka ei sinun ole, joka suloisilla sanoilla puhuttelee,
verses.king_james: To deliver thee from the strange woman, even from the stranger which flattereth with her words;

verses.latin_vulgate: et relinquit ducem pubertatis suæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֭עֹזֶבֶת אַלּ֣וּף נְעוּרֶ֑יהָ וְאֶת־בְּרִ֖ית אֱלֹהֶ֣יהָ שָׁכֵֽחָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And forsaketh the guide of her youth,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hylkää nuoruutensa johdattajan, ja unohtaa Jumalansa liiton.
verses.king_james: Which forsaketh the guide of her youth, and forgetteth the covenant of her God.

verses.latin_vulgate: et pacti Dei sui oblita est.  Inclinata est enim ad mortem domus ejus,  et ad inferos semitæ ipsius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י שָׁ֣חָה אֶל־מָ֣וֶת בֵּיתָ֑הּ וְאֶל־רְ֝פָאִ֗ים מַעְגְּלֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And hath forgotten the covenant of her God: for her house inclineth unto death, and her paths to hell.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hänen huoneensa kallistuu kuolemaan, ja hänen askeleensa kadotettuin tykö.
verses.king_james: For her house inclineth unto death, and her paths unto the dead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes qui ingrediuntur ad eam non revertentur,  nec apprehendent semitas vitæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־בָּ֭אֶיהָ לֹ֣א יְשׁוּב֑וּן וְלֹֽא־יַ֝שִּׂ֗יגוּ אׇרְח֥וֹת חַיִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: None that go in unto her, shall return again, neither shall they take hold of the paths of life.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jokainen joka menee hänen tykönsä, ei palaja, eikä elämän tielle joudu;
verses.king_james: None that go unto her return again, neither take they hold of the paths of life.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ut ambules in via bona,  et calles justorum custodias :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַ֗עַן תֵּ֭לֵךְ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ טוֹבִ֑ים וְאׇרְח֖וֹת צַדִּיקִ֣ים תִּשְׁמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: That thou mayst walk in a good way: and mayst keep the paths of the just.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettäs vaeltasit hyvää tietä, ja pitäisit hurskasten tiet.
verses.king_james: That thou mayest walk in the way of good men, and keep the paths of the righteous.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui enim recti sunt habitabunt in terra,  et simplices permanebunt in ea ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יְשָׁרִ֥ים יִשְׁכְּנוּ־אָ֑רֶץ וּ֝תְמִימִ֗ים יִוָּ֥תְרוּ בָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For they that are upright, shall dwell in the earth; and the simple shall continue in it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä vanhurskaat asuvat maassa, ja vakaat siinä pysyvät;
verses.king_james: For the upright shall dwell in the land, and the perfect shall remain in it.

verses.latin_vulgate: impii vero de terra perdentur,  et qui inique agunt auferentur ex ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּ֭רְשָׁעִים מֵאֶ֣רֶץ יִכָּרֵ֑תוּ וּ֝בוֹגְדִ֗ים יִסְּח֥וּ מִמֶּֽנָּה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But the wicked shall be destroyed from the earth: and they that do unjustly, shall be taken away from it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta jumalattomat hukutetaan maasta, ja ylönkatsojat siitä teloitetaan.
verses.king_james: But the wicked shall be cut off from the earth, and the transgressors shall be rooted out of it.
